## Pilot Scope

- Sink: `google_contacts` / `odoo`
- Phase: read-only lookup / write pilot / readback pilot
- Run ID:
- Job ID:
- Approver:

## Required Evidence

- [ ] Review decision artifact exists.
- [ ] Duplicate assessment is reviewed.
- [ ] Sink lookup result exists for the selected sink.
- [ ] Apply preflight exists.
- [ ] Apply decision is approved.
- [ ] Pilot readiness is ready for the selected sink and phase.

## Safety Confirmation

- [ ] This request names exactly one job and one sink.
- [ ] No secrets, private card images, raw OCR, or live response logs are pasted here.
- [ ] Rollback/remediation expectations are understood for the selected sink.
